# 🎉 Visual Proof Workflow Status

[![PR Visual Proof](https://github.com/wobbob89/Melksham-Mental-Health/actions/workflows/pr-visual-proof.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/wobbob89/Melksham-Mental-Health/actions/workflows/pr-visual-proof.yml)

## What This Badge Shows

This badge shows the status of the **PR Visual Proof** workflow:

- ✅ **Green (Passing)**: The website is building successfully and screenshots are being generated
- ❌ **Red (Failing)**: There's an issue with the build or screenshot generation
- 🔵 **Blue (Running)**: The workflow is currently running

## How to Add This Badge to Other Files

Copy and paste this markdown to display the badge:

```markdown
[![PR Visual Proof](https://github.com/wobbob89/Melksham-Mental-Health/actions/workflows/pr-visual-proof.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/wobbob89/Melksham-Mental-Health/actions/workflows/pr-visual-proof.yml)
```

---

**Every PR gets automatic visual proof! 📸**
